title: ShaderTech Continued
body:
This is a fork of [ShaderTech](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/shadertech) that covers other mods which have illuminated blocks.

![lanterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a042a8bb3410b69964651ba125ca519cdcda4fa.png)

### Supported and Planned:

. [Additional Lanterns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-lanterns)

. Charm

. FutureMC

. NuclearCraft

. Quark

. [Simply Light](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simply-light)

. Thaum Additions

. Thaumcraft

. Thaumic Augmentation

. Xtones

## Credits:

[ShaderTech](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/shadertech)

[ShaderTech Simply Light](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/shadertech-simply-light)
